description_long: This is a detailed model of a suburban bungalow complex featuring two distinct residential buildings set within a landscaped plot. Both structures have red-tiled hip roofs with scattered white patches, possibly representing snow or weathering, and are surrounded by a low white fence and lush greenery. The larger building has a prominent double garage, multiple large windows, and a paved driveway flanked by tall, narrow trees. The smaller building features a covered porch with columns, a compact garden, and a pathway leading to the main entrance. The grounds are partially covered with grass and paved walkways, and the overall layout suggests a well-maintained, upscale neighborhood setting. The architectural style blends modern and traditional elements, with symmetrical facades, grouped windows, and decorative shrubbery.
description: A pair of red-roofed suburban bungalows with large windows, porches, and landscaped gardens, set within a fenced plot.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the backyards, red-tiled roofs, and the fenced perimeter with visible greenery.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrances, double garage, paved driveway, and symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the driveway, garage, and the spatial relationship between the two buildings.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view focusing on the back facades, garden areas, and the separation between the two houses.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
